scope: Cycle 8 bug hunt on cycle 7 files (retro_psx_post.gdshader, screen_dither_layer.gd, broceliande_forest_3d.gd, merlin_visual.gd)

bugs_found.description: queue_free() on autoload CanvasLayer children destroyed CRTLayer permanently after leaving forest
bugs_found.fix: Changed to hide-only, added render mode save/restore

bugs_found.description: Time-of-day labels wrong: Midi during dawn, Nuit from 0.55
bugs_found.fix: Corrected ranges: Nuit<0.15, Aube 0.15-0.30, Jour 0.30-0.70, Crepuscule 0.70-0.85

bugs_found.description: is_night threshold 0.55 was 30% too early, fireflies at full in afternoon
HUD and encounter effects referenced /root/GameManager instead of MerlinStore
set_color_levels() set 'color_levels' param which doesn't exist in PSX shader
set_phosphor_tint() set CRT-only 'phosphor_tint' param in PSX mode

overall_assessment: Cycle 8 bug hunt: 6 bugs found and fixed (1 CRITICAL + 3 HIGH + 2 MEDIUM). retro_psx_post.gdshader and merlin_visual.gd were clean. All bugs in broceliande_forest_3d.gd (4) and screen_dither_layer.gd (2). 24 total bugs fixed across 8 cycles.
